name: send_document
description: Send a document to its recipients for review and electronic signature. The document must be in draft or completed status. Recipients will receive an email with a link to view and sign the document.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the document to send.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Custom message to include in the email sent to recipients.
parameters.example: Please review and sign this agreement at your earliest convenience.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Custom email subject line. If omitted, PandaDoc uses the document name.

parameters.name: silent
parameters.description: If true, the document status changes to sent but no email notification is delivered to recipients.

body.message: Please review and sign this agreement at your earliest convenience.
body.subject: Sales Agreement Ready for Signature
